_meta.source: μ's (Love Live! School Idol Project) characters, derived from raw data with fan vote data considered as evidence
_meta.note_on_fan_votes: Fan MBTI votes provided as input signal but not treated as authoritative. Used as weighted evidence alongside textual analysis. Majority vote followed when supported by independent analysis; flagged when close.
_meta.note_on_traits_format: Each trait includes both score (-10 to +10) and reason (textual justification from analysis).

honoka_kosaka.name: Honoka Kosaka

E.reason: Very strong extrovert. Magnetic-broadcast charisma, 'always in a good mood' baseline, charismatic-pull that drags others into her orbit (Umi/Maki/Kotori all joined despite initial-reluctance because of her energy), approaches-everyone-readily, sociable-baseline-default, 'uplifting presence is what keeps μ's afloat' (reddit A), childhood-friend-magnet (befriended Umi by inviting her to hide-and-seek as kids — proactive-bond-initiation since young). Tempered by S1-breakdown where she withdrew, tried to quit μ's, and pulled back from broadcast-mode after Kotori-leaving + overwork-collapse — real withdrawal-capacity under values-injury. Not Ai-tier (+9) pure-radiation because the depression-arc shows her extroversion has real collapse-points when authentic-want is violated.

J.reason: Solid P. 'Ditsy, impulsive, not that great at reading others' (reddit A), 'lazy and reluctant to do work' outside chosen-domain (wikipedia explicit), 'very impulsive, and maybe too carefree' (reddit C), mood-swings explicitly noted as hilarious-trait, doesn't-plan-well baseline (reddit C: 'her maths would be mathing... not sure'), Ne-impulsive-possibility-following pattern. Tempered by sustained-multi-year-pursuit within chosen-domain (idol-activities, eventual presidency) — willpower-discipline emerges when intrinsic-motivation hits, classic Ne-Fi engagement-pattern where Te is too weak to push through dutiful-work without authentic-want activation. Net P through baseline-disorganization overriding domain-specific-discipline.

T.reason: Strong F. Heart-driven speeches as president (reddit C: 'doesn't elaborate the dialogue to make a good impression on others, she just says what she wants to tell the people with her heart'), feelings-driven decisions throughout, 'Mou Hitori Ja Nai Yo' kindness-as-core-theme, no analytical-cognition anywhere, decision-making purely from felt-conviction. Same range as Chika (-5) — pure F-cognition-engine without analytical-surface.

C.reason: Moderate-high positive. 'Optimist who is never afraid to take risks' baseline, willing-to-attempt-school-saving-via-idols-from-zero (extreme risk-tolerance), charismatic-leader-confidence-without-domain-expertise, 'I will do my best with the mindset that I won't lose to anyone when it comes to working hard' self-intro confidence. Per Rule 3 (baseline-not-presentation) — her 'ordinary girl who isn't good at anything' framing is acknowledgment-not-wound (compare actual Fi-inadequacy-wounds in Yohane/Sumire which produced compensatory-personas; Honoka has no such persona-construction). Tempered substantially by S1-breakdown showing real emotional-vulnerability and depression-baseline (reddit C: 'depression she went through at the beginning must have been truly horrible'). Net moderate-high through positive-baseline with real-collapse-points rather than imperturbable-confidence.

M.reason: High. Multi-year sustained pursuit of school-saving + idol-success + Love-Live-victory + presidency-succession, 'once her mind is set on something, nothing can stop her' (raw text explicit), willpower-as-defining-trait per reddit C, 'she pulled others along, not specifically because she wanted to make them happy but mostly because being a school idol with them would be fun and she was inspired by A-RISE' (PDB A) — self-driven-want pulling-others-into-her-orbit. Per M = WANT not WORK rule, her want is genuine self-originated 'experience being an idol' authentic-self-pursuit. Same tier as Chika (+6) — both are protagonist-ambition-scale, want is shine-pursuit not competitive-domination or empire-building. Not max because the want is experiential-and-relational rather than empire-or-status-driven.

O.reason: Very high. 'Boundless optimism' (reddit A), 'blind optimism' explicitly named multiple times, 'always in a good mood and likes to look at the bright side of things' (raw text), 'wills the rain away' (mythical-status optimism per reddit A), recovers from S1-breakdown into S2-leadership, 'uplifting presence keeps μ's afloat,' 'paper-airplane-equivalent perseverance' (Chika's symbol traces back to Honoka's pattern). Same tier as Chika (+7) — textbook resilience-leader. Tempered slightly by genuine S1-depression-arc (real collapse-and-recovery rather than imperturbable-cheerfulness) but the recovery-pattern is decisive — earned-resilience same family as Chika/Yu/Ai/Kaho cluster.

A.reason: Moderate-high. Genuine kindness underneath impulsive-surface ('Mou Hitori Ja Nai Yo' theme is reaching-out-to-others-in-pain-with-reassurance per reddit D), cares-deeply-about-friends, kindness-articulated-through-songs and actions, supportive-of-Eli-as-presidency-mentor relationship. Tempered significantly by 'not that great at reading others' (reddit A) — empathy is broadcast-from-self rather than precision-attuning, and per PDB A she's NOT primarily motivated by helping-others; she pulls them along into her own want. Lower than Chika (+6) because Chika's mission is explicitly other-shine-enabling-systematic; Honoka's is shared-fun-pursuit-with-friends — care exists genuinely but isn't the engine the way it is for Fe-doms.

U.reason: Low per U-requires-external-and-internal-alignment rule. Self-described 'ordinary girl who isn't good at anything,' reddit E: 'easy to dismiss Honoka as a simple generic genki girl,' deliberately-written-as-relatable-everygirl-original-protagonist (the FIRST franchise protagonist, the template that Chika and Kanon then imitated). Surface specifics exist (Homura wagashi shop family, sticker-collecting hobby, swimming, kendo-club in manga, bread-but-not-bean-paste joke despite working at sweets shop, 'Three Idiots' nickname with Rin/Nico, sister Yukiho) but core archetype is conventional-genki-protagonist-by-design. Same range as Chika (-3) and Kanon (-3) — the relatable-protagonist cluster who are deliberately-ordinary-as-writing-choice.

N.reason: Moderate-high N. Ne-dom signature throughout: parallel multi-interests (swimming + sticker-collecting + kendo-manga + idol + presidency simultaneously), impulsive-possibility-following pattern, the foundational 'save-the-school-by-becoming-idols' idea is wild Ne-conceptual-leap unprompted by precedent (no one else thought of this — reddit C: 'who would think of creating an idol group to save a school? exactly because that's a crazy idea no one would think'), Ne-spontaneous-creative-leaps applied to leadership-decisions. Tempered by inferior-Si signature (overexerts because doesn't track concrete-physical-state, doesn't catalog past-warnings about her body's limits, oblivious-to-bodily-exhaustion leading to collapse — classic inferior-Si pattern). Same range as Chika (+3) — both are genki-protagonist-Ne-or-Ni-aux-or-dom-tier rather than pure-abstract-visionary.

honoka_kosaka.mbti_reasoning: ENFP with overwhelming fan vote majority (297 vs 8 ESFP, ~97/3) and textual analysis cleanly supports it. The voting pool offered different-dom-types (Ne-dom vs Se-dom), so the contested axis is real Ne-vs-Se rather than narrow E/I split. The 97/3 split could trigger lopsided-with-stereotype-pull concern since 'genki-girl-leader-protagonist' pulls ENFP as franchise-default, but stress-testing against actual cognition shows the consensus is correct rather than aesthetic-projection — Honoka genuinely runs Ne-Fi engine and not Se-Fi or Ni-Fe. CRITICAL CROSS-CAST DIAGNOSTIC: Honoka being ENFP retroactively confirms why Chika's 'I tried to be Honoka and couldn't' arc had to fail structurally. Chika is ENFJ (Ni-Fe) and tried to imitate ENFP (Ne-Fi) Honoka. Different cognitive engines — Chika reads-the-group-state and intervenes systematically; Honoka follows-her-own-energy and others get swept up. Both work as leadership-styles, but they're NOT interchangeable. The franchise itself articulates this through Chika's 'find my own shine' arc — the Watsonian frame is 'everyone has their own journey,' the cognitive frame is that Chika's Ni-Fe cannot run Honoka's Ne-Fi authentic-self-pursuit-pulling-others-along program. Decisive Fi-over-Fe evidence (the inverse of every Fe-diagnostic that hit Chika): (1) Authentic emotion expression, NOT suppression. Reddit C: 'she just says what she wants to tell the people with her heart.' Compare to Chika who explicitly 'tries hard not to cry... feels it would drag down others' morale.' Chika suppresses for group-harmony; Honoka expresses authentically regardless of impression-management. This is the cleanest Fi-vs-Fe contrast in the dataset. (2) S1-ending breakdown was open and total. When Kotori announced leaving + Honoka was overworked → she fell apart openly, tried to QUIT μ's, withdrew. Fi-doms collapse openly when authentic-values get violated; Fe-doms push through to maintain group-function. Honoka shut down. (3) Self-driven want, NOT other-enabling mission. PDB A nails it: 'she wasn't primarily motivated as a school idol to inspire others or make them happy, it was more for the experience of being an idol... she pulled others along, not specifically because she wanted to make them happy but mostly because being a school idol with them would be fun and she was inspired by A-RISE.' Honoka does what SHE wants and pulls others into the energy. Chika has a systematic mission to help-others-shine. Different engines entirely. (4) Umi-rejection scene is decisive. Reddit A: 'Umi and Maki were completely opposed in episodes 1 and 2, but joined anyway because of Honoka. If Honoka was focused on pleasing others, she would have chosen a different plan after Umi said no. Instead, she tried harder and practiced alone, fully intending on becoming a school idol anyway.' Fe-doms PIVOT when they hit relational resistance because they read others' feelings as primary-input. Fi-doms keep pursuing their authentic path even when others resist. Honoka practiced ALONE after rejection — that's Fi-conviction in personal-want against social-resistance. Pure Fi-dom signature. Decisive Ne-over-Ni evidence: multiple parallel interests (swimming, sticker collecting, kendo in manga, school idol, presidency), 'impulsive' repeatedly noted across all sources, the leap-of-possibility itself ('save the school by becoming idols' is wild Ne-conceptual-jump unprompted by precedent — reddit C explicitly: 'who would think of creating an idol group to save a school?'). Compare Chika's Ni: laser-singular-focus, waits-for-insight, locks-onto-vision-then-refines through reality-feedback. Honoka's Ne is multi-directional and impulsive — the ideas come from spontaneous-possibility-generation rather than convergent-vision-waiting. Wikipedia note 'lazy and reluctant to do work but highly driven when it comes to school idol activities' is classic Ne-Fi pattern — engagement-energy depends entirely on whether it hits Fi-want, Te-inferior is too weak to push through dutiful-work without intrinsic-motivation. ESFP ruled out: Se-doms engage with what's directly in front of them through present-tactile-engagement. Honoka's school-saving plan is abstract-conceptual-leap requiring Ne-possibility-generation, not present-tactile-engagement. Her enthusiasm is for the IDEA of being an idol (ENFP) not the immediate-physical-stage-experience (ESFP). The 8 ESFP votes are noise. ENFJ ruled out by all four Fe-vs-Fi diagnostics above — Honoka is the inverse-shape of every Fe-pattern that defined Chika. First μ's character analyzed. Joins the ENFP family — sixth ENFP across the four casts (Kasumi Nijigasaki, Kaho + Hime Hasunosora, Keke + Sumire Liella, Yohane Aqours, now Honoka). The cluster splits into persona-constructors (Kasumi, Sumire, Yohane — Fi-inadequacy-wound → compensatory persona) and no-persona radiators (Kaho, Hime, Keke). Honoka is firmly in the no-persona group — her self-intro 'ordinary girl who isn't good at anything' is relatable-protagonist-framing not Yohane-style 'too ordinary' identity-wound driving compensatory-construction. She's just authentically energetic-determined-impulsive. Closest structural parallel is Kaho specifically — both are sunshine-radiator ENFPs who pull others along by infectious-energy without constructed-defensive-layers, both have 'I'm not good at anything special but I'll work hard anyway' honest self-articulation. Difference: Kaho is metaphor-generator-creative-articulator; Honoka is more action-impulsive and less verbally-creative. Honoka is the childlike-naive variant of the no-persona ENFP — reddit A: 'childlike naiveity that makes me think there's no one better to lead Love Live's first group.' She's the most-childlike-Ne-Fi-impulsive of the cluster, the original genki-protagonist template that Chika (ENFJ-imitating) and Kanon (INFP-following) and Yu (ENFJ-pastor) all reference downstream. Confidence ~90/10 ENFP over alternatives. Very clean call matching overwhelming fan vote — and unlike many overwhelming-vote cases, the cognitive-evidence aligns cleanly with the consensus rather than fighting against it. The Honoka-as-ENFP determination is also load-bearing for understanding the franchise's leader-typology: Honoka (Ne-Fi original), Chika (Ni-Fe imitator who had to find own-engine), Kanon (Fi-Ne-introvert pulled-by-friend), Yu (Ni-Fe pastor parallel to Chika).

eli_ayase.name: Eli Ayase

E.reason: Moderate extrovert. Holds high-public-role with authority (student council president pre-Honoka, 'highly respected and well-known among the students,' 'has a lot of fans in the school'), strategist-broadcast role (planned Akihabara street-performance promotion), 'After she joined the group, their popularity rose' (charisma-attraction), 'wonderful sense of order and process to Mu's' (active outward leadership). Tempered substantially by reserved-emotional-default — 'stoic and skeptical in the early episodes,' 'doesn't express emotions easily' (reddit A), 'cold and standoffish' baseline before opening up, kind-only-to-close-people pattern. E through role-execution and public-broadcast capacity rather than pure-social-energy-radiation. Slightly less than Dia (+4) because Dia's outward-Te is brash-melodramatic-and-loud while Eli's is quiet-stoic-strict. Both extroverted-in-role; Eli is the quieter ESTJ variant.

J.reason: Very high. Student council president 'flawlessly performing her duties' (wikipedia explicit), ballet-discipline-multi-year through physical-repetition-mastery (even if she didn't make it competitively, the discipline-pattern is internalized), 'wonderful sense of order and process to Mu's' (reddit A), multi-domain disciplined-excellence (academics + athletics + presidency + ballet + idol-choreographer), works-through-proper-channels-systematically (tried chairwoman-permission before any rule-breaking approach), strategist-promotional-planning. Same range as Dia (+7) — top of J-range. The narcoleptic-speech-with-mistakes under blizzard-stress shows J-structure can fail under inferior-Ne-overwhelm but the baseline is rigid-disciplined-execution.

T.reason: Solid T. Te-dom utility-logic-orientation, strict-rule-enforcement (initially opposed idol-club through proper authority-channels), level-headed-decision-making, strategist-thinking (Akihabara plan), 'mature and level-headed' baseline. Tempered by Fi-tert specific-warmth (Alisa-care, Nozomi-bond, eventual μ's-membership-warmth), emotional-vulnerability when J-form drops (haunted-house-fear, plastic-chocolate-naivete, narcoleptic-speech-mistakes, ballet-trauma-emotional-wound). Same range as Dia (+3) — Te-Fi tsundere signature with strict-cold surface and warmth-to-bonded-people underneath.

C.reason: Slight positive. External role-confidence high — presidency-flawless-execution, academic-athletic-multi-domain-excellence, 'beautiful, tall, and has a great body shape' (Honoka's compliment), 'highly respected and well-known among students.' But carries substantial ballet-trauma-wound (was at the bottom of the list, 'could barely pass the auditions,' gave up dream of becoming a ballet dancer, 'gradually tried to close her heart and distance herself from her dream to shine and dance again'), self-intro acknowledges 'I've never learned to sing or dance,' emotional-vulnerability-when-form-drops (afraid-of-dark, haunted-house-monsters, plastic-chocolate-naivete, narcoleptic-speech-mistakes), 'defective leader' without Honoka per reddit D. Per Rule 3 (baseline-not-presentation), role-driven competence-confidence riding over real ballet-trauma-wound. Same range as Dia (+1) — earned-through-role-mastery with real-vulnerability-core.

M.reason: High. Driven-to-save-school-within-system as multi-year sustained-mission, academic-athletic-multi-domain-excellence-pursuit (top-tier across domains), president-role with real-responsibility-execution, eventually commits to μ's idol-victory pursuit. Per M = WANT not WORK rule — her primary want is family-legacy-and-school-preservation framed through duty-execution, not pure self-originated-competitive-drive. Past-ballet-want was abandoned through trauma; current-want is duty-driven preserve-grandmother's-school. Slightly less than Dia (+6) because Dia's Aqours-victory-pursuit had explicit-competitive-framing ('won't forgive you unless you win at all costs,' 'two defeats do not suit a daughter of the Kurosawa family'); Eli's framing was preservation-oriented-and-protective rather than competitive-domination.

O.reason: Slight pessimist. Past-ballet-trauma projecting-forward as caution — initially opposed idol-club because she expected demoralization-and-failure-pattern same as her own past-experience. 'Tried to close her heart and distance herself from her dream' is protective-pessimism stance, expecting-pain-from-pursuing-dreams. Inferior-Ne what-if-anxiety from past-trauma-catalog visible in: afraid-of-dark, haunted-house-monsters, narcoleptic-speech-anxiety-mistakes under stress. Improved through arc into more-supportive mode after joining μ's, but baseline is fear-of-failure-from-past-trauma. Same range as Dia (-1) and Ren (-1) — inferior-Ne what-if-pessimism family generated from Si-past-trauma-catalog.

A.reason: Moderate positive. Tsundere-caring-underneath pattern — 'very kind and caring towards people who are close to her, like her little sister' (raw text explicit), big-sister-to-Alisa with sustained-bond, deep-bond-with-Nozomi (Nozomi 'completes Eli's character' per reddit A, NozoEli ship across the entire series), eventually-warms-to-all-μ's-members and becomes invested in group-success. Behind-the-scenes-care pattern (worked through chairwoman to save school, even when externally opposing Honoka). Tempered by cold-stoic-strict surface that opposed-club-initially, 'doesn't express emotions easily,' bounded-Fi-warmth (specific-people only — kind-to-Alisa-and-Nozomi, cold-to-strangers-or-rule-breakers). Same range as Dia (+3) — Te-Fi tsundere with earned-warmth-to-bonded-people.

U.reason: Moderate-positive. External specifics: part-Russian-grandmother-heritage with 'хорошо/Harasho' catchphrase as cultural-language-preservation, ballet-elite-past-trauma backstory (rare for the franchise), foreign-blonde-tall aesthetic with mixed-heritage identity (family lived abroad, hasn't fully adapted to Japan), Otonokizaka-grandmother-legacy unique-multi-generational-family-tradition, quilting-specialty hobby (unusual choice), afraid-of-dark + plastic-chocolate-naivete + haunted-house-fears contrast with strict-cold surface, ballet-Tchaikovsky cultural-aesthetic-pull. Internal personality has the dual-mode (strict-cold vs goofy-cute) that some readers found jarring (reddit B: 'gap between strict cold Eli-before-μ's and the goofy cutesy Eli-in-μ's'), suggesting some interior-eccentricity beyond pure-tsundere-archetype. More distinctive than Dia (+1) due to foreign-Russian-heritage and ballet-trauma-specific arc and cultural-bridge identity.

N.reason: Strongly S. Si-aux throughout — past-experience-as-present-reference-anchor (ballet-trauma driving caution about Honoka's club, same pattern as Dia's first-Aqours-disbandment-trauma), grandmother-Otonokizaka-legacy preservation as core-motivation, ballet-discipline as Si-physical-repetition-craft-mastery internalized over years, choreographer-role applies past-training to present-context, quilting concrete-craft-detail-mastery, traditional-cultural-preservation (Russian-heritage-language 'harasho' tradition-passing), worked-through-proper-institutional-channels (Si-respect-for-process-and-tradition). Multiple inferior-Ne signals: catastrophic-what-if-projections from past-trauma (ballet → idol failure projection), afraid-of-dark-and-haunted-house-monsters (fearful-imagination-of-unknown-possibilities), plastic-chocolate-naivete (failing to consider abstract-possibility-it-might-be-fake — ENTJs with Se-tert would test physically), narcoleptic-speech-mistakes-under-stress (Si-execution-failing under blizzard pressure). Same range as Dia (-5) — strong Si-aux with inferior-Ne what-if-anxiety. No abstract-visionary-future-projection content; her 'strategic' thinking is Te-Si pragmatic-application-of-known-facts (Akihabara-as-idol-mecca → promotional-leverage), not Ni-vision-projection.

eli_ayase.mbti_reasoning: ESTJ — DISSENTING FROM MAJORITY FAN VOTE. Fans voted ENTJ 191 vs ESTJ 94 (~67/33). The 67/33 split is contested-not-overwhelming, suggesting voters are split between aesthetic-pull (foreign-blonde-elite-strict-cold-strategist reads ENTJ) and cognitive-engine evidence (Si-aux pattern points ESTJ). The contested axis is narrow — both types are Te-dom + Fi-tert; the only diagnostic question is Si-aux vs Ni-aux. Going Si-aux with ~65/35 confidence — real judgment call, hedged honestly, not slam-dunk. Decisive Si-aux-over-Ni-aux evidence: (1) Past-ballet-trauma is the foundational-character-anchor — she was at the bottom in ballet, gave up her dream, 'tried to close her heart and distance herself from her dream to shine and dance again,' and this past-failure-trauma is what drives her present-decision-making (initially opposed Honoka's idol-club because she projected her own ballet-failure-pattern forward as expected-outcome). This is the EXACT same pattern as Dia (ESTJ): past-trauma → projected-onto-present → block-the-other-from-attempting → eventual-warming-after-they-succeed. Dia's pattern was 'afraid they would be demoralized in the same fashion she was in the past'; Eli's is structurally identical with ballet substituted for first-Aqours. ENTJs don't typically have this past-trauma-as-primary-anchor pattern — they have forward-vision-Ni building structures they imagine. Compare Lanzhu (ENTJ Nijigasaki — institution-builder with abstract-Association-vision), Margarete (INTJ Hasunosora — patient-vision-execution toward abstract-future-state). ENTJs build forward; Eli was BLOCKING-FORWARD because past-failure-says-it-won't-work. That's Si-aux pessimism not Ni-aux strategy. (2) Tradition-preservation as motivation — grandmother's-Otonokizaka-legacy is THE reason she's saving the school. Si-Te traditional-family-institution-preservation. ENTJ would build something new; ESTJ preserves something inherited. (3) Quilting as specialty hobby — concrete-craft-detail-mastery, classic Si-pattern. ENTJs have Se-tert which is more kinetic-physical-engagement, not detail-craftsmanship. (4) Choreographer role applies past-ballet-training-concretely to present-task — Si-aux pattern of 'apply known-mastery to new-context.' (5) Multiple inferior-Ne signals: 'almost ate plastic chocolate thinking it was real' (failing to consider abstract-possibility-it-might-be-fake — ENTJs with Se-tert would consider that possibility readily and test physically), 'afraid of the dark and haunted-house monsters' (inferior-Ne fearful-imagination-of-unknown-possibilities — classic Si-aux pattern; ENTJs with Se-tert tend to be more grounded-in-physical-reality and less prone to imaginative-fear), narcoleptic-speech with errors that Alisa pointed out under blizzard-stress (Si-execution-failing-under-stress, not Ni-vision-disconnection). (6) Working-through-proper-channels before Honoka's bottom-up jump — Si-respect-for-institutional-process. She tried to save school through chairwoman-permission-system before Honoka's break-the-rules approach. ENTJs are more willing to break-or-bypass-systems if vision-demands-it. (7) Reddit D explicitly catches it: 'without someone like Honk she's a defective leader.' Eli executes-given-mission excellently but doesn't generate-vision herself. Her presidency-mastery is duty-execution, not vision-creation. ENTJ leader-archetype creates-the-mission-from-vision; ESTJ leader-archetype executes-the-mission-flawlessly. Eli is decisively the second. (8) The Akihabara-promotional-strategy that voters cite as ENTJ-strategic-vision is actually Te-Si pragmatic-application: knowing-Akihabara-is-idol-fan-mecca (Si-data-from-cultural-knowledge) + applying-it-pragmatically (Te-utility) + choosing-street-performance-as-accessible-format (Te-pragmatic). Not visionary-strategy — pragmatic-Te applying-known-facts to immediate-promotional-needs. ESTJ-level strategic-thinking. (9) Reddit B's complaint about the 'gap between strict cold Eli-before-μ's and the goofy cutesy Eli-in-μ's' is suggestive of Si-aux being routinely-strict (executing-the-form) and then releasing into Ne-tert playful when the form drops. ENTJ-Ni doesn't typically have this dual-mode quality; the Ni-vision integrates the personality more uniformly. ENTJ case (steelmanned): strategic-thinking around Akihabara, all-around-excellence (academic + athletic + presidency), foreign-elite aesthetic, cold-stoic-distant baseline, sense-of-order-and-process. Each has ESTJ-compatible reading: strategic-thinking is Te-Si pragmatic-application, all-around-excellence is Te-Si multi-domain-disciplined-execution (ESTJs can be all-around-excellent too — duty-driven mastery across-domains), foreign-elite-aesthetic is just aesthetic, cold-stoic-distant is Te-Fi tsundere-strict (same as Dia), sense-of-order-and-process is Te-Si rule-enforcement-and-routine-discipline. The 67% ENTJ vote reflects genuine-aesthetic-pull but the cognitive-engine evidence is decisively Si-aux. INTJ ruled out by clear extroversion (presidency-public-role-execution, fans-among-students, broadcast-strategist-role) and by inferior-Ne pattern (INTJs have inferior-Se, not inferior-Ne). ISTJ ruled out by E/I — Eli holds a high-public-role with confidence and authority, has fans-among-students, and operates outwardly-broadcast-strategist mode. She's reserved-emotionally but extroverted-in-role-execution. Same E/I calibration as Dia. Second μ's character analyzed. Joins the ESTJ family — second ESTJ across all five casts (Dia Aqours, now Eli). Both are tsundere-strict-president types with past-trauma-anchoring + family-legacy-tradition + Te-Si-Ne-Fi stack. Both initially opposed the genki-protagonist's idol-club due to past-failure-projection (Dia from first-Aqours-disbandment; Eli from ballet-failure). Both warmed-up to the group eventually and became indispensable members. Differences in flavor: Dia is hime-cut-traditional-Japanese, Eli is foreign-Russian-blonde; Dia's outward-Te is brash-melodramatic (buzzer 'Buu buu desu wa!', loud, kanji-pedantry, melodramatic-outbursts), Eli's outward-Te is stoic-cold (quiet, level-headed, strict, reserved); Dia projects-trauma-forward but maintains brash-affect, Eli projects-trauma-forward and goes withdrawn-cold; Dia has Ruby (sister-care via Fi-tert) + prestigious-family-platform, Eli has Alisa (sister-care) + grandmother-legacy + foreign-heritage-bridge. Same architecture, different aesthetic and affect. Eli is the QUIETER ESTJ variant — less brash, more stoic, trauma-cold-tsundere flavor. Dia is the LOUDER ESTJ variant — prestigious-strict-tsundere with brash-melodramatic outbursts. Both have Fi-tert specific-warmth-to-bonded-people (Eli→Nozomi, Alisa; Dia→Ruby, eventually Kanan/Mari) and inferior-Ne what-if-anxiety from past-trauma-catalog. Reddit D's comparison to Asuka Soryu (Evangelion) as 'the Tsundere' archetype is meaningful — Eli is the trauma-cold-tsundere ESTJ variant. Confidence ~65/35 ESTJ over ENTJ — real judgment call, dissent-flagged honestly. The dissent is real — if someone argued ENTJ hard using the strategic-elite-aesthetic surface, the strongest counter is the cumulative pattern of past-trauma-as-primary-anchor + tradition-preservation-motivation + multiple-inferior-Ne-signals (plastic-chocolate, haunted-house-fears, speech-mistakes) + Te-Si-pragmatic-application-rather-than-Ni-vision (Akihabara plan) + reddit D's 'defective-leader-without-Honoka' execution-vs-vision diagnostic. The aesthetic surface does pull ENTJ; the cognitive architecture is Si-aux.

kotori_minami.name: Kotori Minami
